Web links

December 2000
Government & Politics

The Freedom of Information Center at the University of Missouri maintains a comprehensive library of over one million articles on government information access, while the Reporters Committee for Freedom of the Press provides resources for journalists seeking to understand their rights.

The Freedom of Information Center at the University of Missouri is a reference and research library that has more than one million articles on access to governmental information. Its Web site is http://web.missouri.edu/~foiwwwl

The Reporters Committee for Freedom of the Press www.rcfp.org
